description_long: This is a multi-story brick apartment building with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features large, regularly spaced windows and several awnings above ground-level entrances, suggesting commercial or communal spaces. The rear side is equipped with multiple metal fire escape staircases, providing emergency access to each floor. The building is set on a concrete base with small landscaped areas and sidewalks in front. The side walls are plain, with no windows, emphasizing the building's urban, row-house style. The overall structure is robust, with a utilitarian yet inviting appearance typical of city apartment complexes.
description: A large, brick apartment building with flat roofs, prominent windows, ground-level awnings, and rear fire escapes, set in an urban environment.
description_view_0: Side view showing plain brick walls with no windows or entrances.
description_view_1: Front view displaying symmetrical windows, multiple awnings, and landscaped sidewalk areas.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with plain brick walls and no windows.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring multiple metal fire escape staircases and back entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, evenly spaced across the facade, with each floor having a consistent pattern.
